# Idaho Down Payment Assistance Programs

> Idaho's resource for IHFA and local down payment assistance programs. Updated May 2026.

This site helps Idaho homebuyers find and understand down payment assistance (DPA) programs they may qualify for.

## Site Purpose

Idaho DPA Finder is a free educational resource that tracks down payment assistance programs across Idaho. We provide:

- IHFA-centric program directory with eligibility requirements and funding status
- Free eligibility quiz (no SSN required)
- FY 2026 HUD income limits for Ada, Canyon, Bonneville, and Kootenai counties
- City-specific program guides for Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Idaho Falls, and Coeur d'Alene

## Key Facts

- 10 DPA programs in directory (9 currently active)
- IHFA statewide DPA: up to 8% of sales price with $500 minimum out-of-pocket
- Household income limit up to $170,000 for IHFA programs
- Program types: repayable second mortgages, deferred loans, and first mortgage products
- Covers key Idaho markets: Treasure Valley, East Idaho, North Idaho

## Content Structure

- /guide - Complete 2026 Idaho DPA Guide (pillar page)
- /programs - Directory of all programs with filters
- /programs/[slug] - Individual program details
- /locations - Programs by city
- /locations/[slug] - City-specific guides (Boise, Meridian, Nampa, Idaho Falls, Coeur d'Alene)
- /first-time-home-buyer - First-time buyer guide
- /income-limits - FY 2026 HUD income limits by county
- /quiz - Free eligibility quiz

## Top Programs (2026)

1. IHFA Down Payment & Closing Cost Assistance - Up to 8% of sales price (statewide)
2. IHFA First Loan + DPA Combo - Competitive first mortgage paired with DPA
3. Boise Homeownership Opportunity Program (HOP) - Up to $45,000–$65,000 in Boise city limits (NeighborWorks Boise or LEAP Housing)
4. Idaho Heroes DPA - Up to 8% for nurses, teachers, and first responders ($500 contribution waived)
5. Treasure Valley Overview - IHFA + local programs for Ada and Canyon counties
6. AutumnGold Affordable Housing - DPA on select renovated/new homes (Treasure Valley, waitlist)

## Priority Location Guides

- /locations/boise - Boise down payment assistance, IHFA + HOP
- /locations/meridian - Meridian Idaho DPA, IHFA programs
- /locations/nampa - Nampa / Canyon County IHFA programs
- /locations/idaho-falls - East Idaho IHFA programs
- /locations/coeur-d-alene - North Idaho / Kootenai County programs

## Typical Eligibility Requirements

- IHFA household income limit: up to $170,000 statewide
- Local programs (City of Boise HOP): 50–80% AMI
- Credit score: 620+ for FHA, 640+ for IHFA First, 680+ for conventional
- Primary residence requirement
- Finally Home! homebuyer education (IHFA programs)
- First-time AND repeat buyers eligible for IHFA DPA
